<!-- vignettes/articles/roborev-architecture/_setup.qmd
     Shared setup partial for the roborev-architecture page set. Included as
     the FIRST body line of every page in this folder (see index.qmd and
     siblings). Re-runs the shared hover-popup infrastructure and the
     original setup chunk — including the PALETTE colour vector — on every
     page, since each page is now an independent render target
     (JohnGavin/llm#778 Phase 2). See narrative-colour-persistence rule.
-->

{{< include /_includes/hover-popups.qmd >}}

```{r setup}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse  = TRUE,
  comment   = "#>",
  message   = FALSE,
  warning   = FALSE,
  echo      = FALSE
)

# Colour palette — define ONCE, reuse in every chart
PALETTE <- c(
  "open"                 = "#f08080",
  "closed"               = "#69d4a0",
  "clean-verdict"        = "#5edaff",
  "severity-medium"      = "#ffd93d",
  "manual"               = "#c084fc",
  "clean-verdict-pre-fix" = "#4ea8de"
)
```
